timeline.body: {"error":{"code":429,"message":"You exceeded your current quota, please check your plan and billing details. For more information on this error, head to: https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/rate-limits.","status":"RESOURCE_EXHAUSTED","details":[{"@type":"type.googleapis.com/google.rpc.QuotaFailure","violations":[{"quotaMetric":"generativelanguage.googleapis.com/generate_content_free_tier_input_token_count","quotaId":"GenerateContentInputTokensPerModelPerMinute-FreeTier","quotaDimensions":{"location":"global","model":"gemini-2.5-flash-preview-image"}},{"quotaMetric":"generativelanguage.googleapis.com/generate_content_free_tier_requests","quotaId":"GenerateRequestsPerMinutePerProjectPerModel-FreeTier","quotaDimensions":{"location":"global","model":"gemini-2.5-flash-preview-image"}},{"quotaMetric":"generativelanguage.googleapis.com/generate_content_free_tier_requests","quotaId":"GenerateRequestsPerDayPerProjectPerModel-FreeTier","quotaDimensions":{"model":"gemini-2.5-flash-preview-image","location":"global"}}]},{"@type":"type.googleapis.com/google.rpc.Help","links":[{"description":"Learn more about Gemini API quotas","url":"https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/rate-limits"}]},{"@type":"type.googleapis.com/google.rpc.RetryInfo","retryDelay":"55s"}]}}
